title: pavonia schrankii
intro: Pavonia schrankii is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, commonly known as the rock rose or rose mallow. Traditionally, Pavonia schrankii has been used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Pavonia schrankii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Pavonia schrankii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
